justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions from the user, including specific dates, days of the week, and time ranges.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly stated unavailability and asked the user to suggest new times without offering any alternative options itself.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent engaged in multiple turns of simply stating unavailability and asking for new input, which could have been streamlined by offering alternatives or a broader search.
justifications.customer_experience: The repeated apologies and inability to proactively offer alternatives led to a frustrating experience for the user, who had to drive the search for availability.

overall_notes: The agent's inability to proactively suggest alternative times or days, even when no slots were found for extended periods, made the conversation very inefficient and frustrating for the user.
